"'''Totally Patriotic'''" was a<ref name="GG9" /> [[Minga (music)|minga]]-style<ref name="slugthrowers" /> [[Music/Legends|song]] by the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Band/Legends|musical group]] [[The Emperor's New Clothes]]. The song was featured on [[Totally Patriotic (The Emperor's New Clothes album)|the album of the same name]], which was available in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] period<ref name="GG9" /> between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> The song was approved by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]], and it was considered one of the band's hits.<ref name="GG9" />

"Totally Patriotic" was later parodied by the anti-Imperial group [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]], who also released a song called "[[Totally Patriotic (Red Shift Limit song)|Totally Patriotic]]" on [[Totally Patriotic (Red Shift Limit album)|their own album with the same name]] and gave the song a completely different meaning. Red Shift Limit's version was banned by the Imperial Board of Culture.<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Totally Patriotic" was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]] and published in [[1993]].<ref name="GG9" />
